metadata.title: Yuthikal AudioTech
metadata.description: Your digital music stand for guitar: chords, songs and karaoke mode with real audio.

auth.title: Sign in to Yuthikal AudioTech
auth.subtitle: Your digital music stand for guitar: chords, songs and karaoke mode.
auth.lockNote: Sign-up is only available with Google

playlists.title: My playlists
playlists.count: {count, plural, =0 {No playlists} one {1 playlist} other {# playlists}}

deleteModal.title: Delete this playlist?
deleteModal.message: "{name}" and all of its songs will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

playlists.songCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 songs} one {1 song} other {# songs}}
playlists.emptyDesc: Create your first playlist to start organizing your songs with lyrics and chords.

errors.name: Name is required (100 characters max).
errors.auth: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

errorDb.title: The database is unavailable due to inactivity
errorDb.description: Contact the administrator to restore the service. Your playlists and songs are safe.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or was moved.

landing.badge: Your digital music stand for guitar
landing.title: Your music, your chords, <accent>your stage</accent>
landing.subtitle: Learn chords, write your songs with lyrics and chord charts, and play them karaoke-style with real synchronized audio — all in one place.
landing.featuresTitle: From the chord to the stage

features.finderDesc: Search by voice or text and browse every position of each chord on the neck.
features.referenceDesc: Strings and notes in Spanish and English, with traditional names and equivalences.
features.songsDesc: Lyrics with chords anchored to each syllable, in the classic chord-sheet format.
features.karaokeDesc: Play the real audio and follow the lyrics and chords in perfect sync.

landing.karaokeTitle: Play the real audio and follow the synced lyrics
landing.karaokeDesc: The current line lights up, chords appear right when they change and the music stand scrolls by itself. Perfect for your phone or tablet while you play.

songs.emptyTitle: This playlist has no songs yet
songs.emptyDesc: Add your first song with its lyrics and chords to start playing.

form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Author, version or a note about this song…

errors.name: Name is required (150 characters max).
errors.auth: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.content: The song exceeds the maximum allowed size.

editor.saveError: Save failed — will retry as you keep editing
editor.previewEmpty: Type on the left to see the preview.
editor.visualHint: Click a word to place a chord above that syllable.
editor.visualEmpty: No lyrics yet. Write them first in the text editor.
editor.deleteMessage: "{name}" will be permanently deleted, including its lyrics and chords. This action cannot be undone.

calibration.dropHint: or click to choose a file (max 15 MB)

granularity.lineHint: Recommended · mark the start of each verse

calibration.tapTitle: Press <kbd>SPACE</kbd> or tap here when this line starts
calibration.tapNeedsAudio: Connect the audio and press play to start marking
calibration.noContent: This song has no lyrics yet. Write them in the editor first.
calibration.resetMessage: The {count} captured marks will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
calibration.granularityChangeMessage: Current marks will be deleted because they belong to a different granularity.

errors.url: That YouTube URL is not valid.
errors.upload: Could not upload the file. Try again.
errors.auth: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

songView.emptyTitle: This song has no content yet
songView.emptyDesc: Open the editor to write the lyrics with their chords in ChordPro format.

comingSoon.edit: The lyrics & chords editor arrives in the next delivery of this phase.

strings.title: The guitar strings
strings.intro: From the highest and thinnest (1st) to the lowest and thickest (6th). In standard tuning, their notes are E–B–G–D–A–E.

notes.title: The musical notes
notes.intro: The 12 notes of the chromatic scale: 7 natural and 5 altered notes (sharps and flats), which on the guitar live one fret apart.

finder.title: Chord finder
finder.searchPlaceholder: Search a chord… e.g. A minor, C#7, Bb
finder.micTitleUnsupported: Your browser does not support voice search. Use Chrome or Edge.
finder.micNote: Voice search requires Chrome or Edge.
finder.micNoteUnsupported: Voice search is not available in this browser — use Chrome or Edge.
finder.emptyHint: Try another notation, e.g. "Am" or "A minor".

instruments.title: Choose your instrument
instruments.subtitle: Start with the guitar. More instruments are coming to your digital music stand soon.

guitar.name: Guitar
guitar.desc: Chords, strings, notes and your songs.
